title: polystichopsis assamica
intro: Polystichopsis assamica, also known as Assam fern, is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polystichopsis assamica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and is commonly used in traditional Indian medicine.
